function UnEquipWeapon(v357)
    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(v357) then
        _G.NotAutoEquip = true
        wait(0.5)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(v357).Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack
        wait(0.1)
        _G.NotAutoEquip = false
    end
end
function EquipWeapon(v358)
    if not _G.NotAutoEquip and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild(v358) then
        Tool = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild(v358)
        wait(0.1)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:EquipTool(Tool)
    end
end

function StopTween(state)
    local player = game:GetService((string.char(80) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(115))).LocalPlayer
    local char = player.Character
    if not char then return end

    local hrp = char:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116)))
    if not hrp then return end

    if not state then
        _G.StopTween = true

        hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
        hrp.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
        hrp.Velocity = Vector3.zero

        for _,obj in pairs(hrp:GetChildren()) do
            if obj:IsA((string.char(66) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(86) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(121)))
            or obj:IsA((string.char(66) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(71) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(111)))
            or obj:IsA((string.char(66) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110)))
            or obj:IsA((string.char(65) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110)))
            or obj:IsA((string.char(65) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(79) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110))) then
      _0x7e5b42 = 64
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 64 then
                      obj:Destroy()
            end
        end

        if hrp:FindFirstChild((string.char(66) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(67) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(112))) then
            hrp.BodyClip:Destroy()
        end
        if char:FindFirstChild((string.char(66) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(107))) then
            char.Block:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

    if plr.Character.Head:FindFirstChild((string.char(66) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(86) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(121))) then
        plr.Character.Head.BodyVelocity:Destroy()
    end
    if plr.Character:FindFirstChild((string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(84) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(101))) then
        plr.Character.PartTele:Destroy()
    end
    NoClip = false
end
function KillMob(v373, v374)
    pcall(function()
        thismob = DetectMob2(v373)
        if thismob:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116))) and thismob.Parent and thismob:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100))) and thismob.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
            repeat
                task.wait()
                Buso()
                EquipWeapon()
                Tween23(thismob.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 15, 0))
                BringPos = thismob.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                BringMob(v373)
                NoClip = true
            until not thismob.Parent or not thismob:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100))) or thismob:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100))).Health <= 0 or not thismob:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116))) or v374()
            NoClip = false
            CancelTween23()
        end
    end)
end

function BTP(v430)
    pcall(function()
        if (v430.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude >= 1500 and not Auto_Raid and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
            repeat
                wait()
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v430
                wait(0.05)
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Head:Destroy()
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v430
            until (v430.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude < 1500 and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health > 0
        end
    end)
end

_G.TargTrial = (string.char(84) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(84) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(108))
function targettrial()
    if _G.TargTrial == (string.char(84) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(84) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(108)) then
        local v450 = nil
        local v451 = 450
        for _, v453 in pairs(game.Players:GetChildren()) do
            c = (v453.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
            if c <= v451 and v453 ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer then
                v451 = c
                v450 = v453
            end
        end
        if v450 == "c" then
            return 
        elseif _G.TargTrial == "c" then
            _G.TargTrial = v450
            return 
        else
            return 
        end
    else
        return 
    end
end

-- Variáveis para o Farm submarino
local SUBMERGED_Y = -1400
local SUB_NPC = CFrame.new(-16246.041, 38.48, 1376.539)
local TravelingSubmerged = false
local CurrentTween = nil

-- Funções auxiliares
local function HRP()
      _0x7e5b42 = 77
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 77 then
          return LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116)))
end

local function IsInSubmerged()
    local hrp = HRP()
    return hrp and hrp.Position.Y < SUBMERGED_Y
end

local function StopTween(state)
    if not state and CurrentTween then
        pcall(function() CurrentTween:Cancel() end)
        CurrentTween = nil
    end
end

local function TweenTo(cf)
    if not _G.AutoFarm then return end
    local hrp = HRP()
    if not hrp then return end

    if CurrentTween then
        pcall(function() CurrentTween:Cancel() end)
    end

    local dist = (hrp.Position - cf.Position).Magnitude
    local speed = 300
    local t = dist / speed

    CurrentTween = TweenService:Create(hrp, TweenInfo.new(t, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), {CFrame = cf})
    CurrentTween:Play()

    while _G.AutoFarm and CurrentTween and CurrentTween.PlaybackState == Enum.PlaybackState.Playing do
        task.wait()
    end

    if CurrentTween then
        pcall(function() CurrentTween:Cancel() end)
    end
    CurrentTween = nil
end

local function GoSubmerged()
    if not _G.AutoFarm then return end
    if TravelingSubmerged or IsInSubmerged() or LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value < 2600 then return end

    TravelingSubmerged = true
    TweenTo(SUB_NPC + Vector3.new(0, 60, 0))
    if not _G.AutoFarm then TravelingSubmerged = false return end
    TweenTo(SUB_NPC)
    if not _G.AutoFarm then TravelingSubmerged = false return end
      _0x7e5b42 = 78
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 78 then
      
    pcall(function()
        _0x1e8466.Modules.Net[(string.char(82) .. string.char(70) .. string.char(47) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(87) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(107) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(112) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(107))]:InvokeServer((string.char(84) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(118) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(84) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(73) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(100)))
    end)

    while _G.AutoFarm and not IsInSubmerged() do
        task.wait(0.5)
    end

    TravelingSubmerged = false
end

end

    local v585 = FindWeapon((string.char(71) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(110)))

        EquipWeapon(v582)
        Skill("Z")
        Skill("X")
        Skill("C")
        Skill("V")
        Click()

        EquipWeapon(v583)
        Skill("Z")
        Skill("X")
        Click()
    end
    if v584 then

        Skill("Z")
        Skill("X")
        Skill("C")
        Skill("F")
        Click()
    end

    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 92 then
              EquipWeapon(v585)
        Skill("Z")
        Skill("X")

    end
end

function DragonMobClear(v837, v838, v839)
    if not workspace.Enemies:FindFirstChild(v838) then
        if v839 then
            topos(v839)
        end

            if v841.Name == v838 and Attack.Alive(v841) and v837 then
                Attack.Kill(v841, v837)
            end
        end
    end
end

v491:AddToggle({

    Default = false,
    Callback = function(v)
        _G.Dungeon = v
    end
})

local function GetIsland(num)
    local closest, dist = nil, math.huge
    for _,v in pairs(workspace._WorldOrigin.Locations:GetChildren()) do
        if v.Name == (string.char(73) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(32))..num then
            local mag = (v.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
            if mag < dist then
                dist = mag
      _0x7e5b42 = 170
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 170 then
                      closest = v
            end
        end
    end
    return closest
end

local function GetNextIsland()
    for _,i in ipairs({5,4,3,2,1}) do
        local isl = GetIsland(i)
        if isl and (isl.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude <= 4500 then
            return isl
        end
    end
end

local function FarmRaidEnemies()
    for _,mob in pairs(workspace.Enemies:GetChildren()) do
        if mob:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116)))
        and mob:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100)))
        and mob.Humanoid.Health > 0
        and (mob.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude <= 1000 then
            repeat
                task.wait(0.1)
                if mob.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
                    EquipWeapon(_G.SelectWeapon)
                    topos(mob.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,30,0))
                end
            until mob.Humanoid.Health <= 0 or not _G.Dungeon
        end
    end
end

task.spawn(function()
    while task.wait() do
        if _G.Dungeon then
            FarmRaidEnemies()
            local isl = GetNextIsland()
            if isl then
                topos(isl.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,60,0))
            end
        end
    end
end)
end

local function TryPortal(position)
    local success = pcall(function()
        game:GetService((string.char(82) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(112) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(101))).Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer((string.char(114) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(113) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(69) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(101)), position)
      _0x7e5b42 = 175
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 175 then
          end)
    return success
end

local function TeleportToIsland()
    if not _G.SelectIsland or not _G.TeleportIsland then return end

    local cf = Islands[_G.SelectIsland]
    if not cf then return end

    if _G.SelectIsland == (string.char(77) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110)) then
        if not TryPortal(Vector3.new(cf.X, cf.Y, cf.Z)) then
            v1116(cf)
        end
        return
    end

    if _G.SelectIsland == (string.char(67) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(79) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(84) .. string.char(104) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(97)) then
        if not TryPortal(Vector3.new(-5083.26, 314.606, -3175.673)) then
            v1116(MansionCFrame)
        end
        return
    end

    v1116(cf)
end

task.spawn(function()
    while task.wait(0.5) do
        if _G.TeleportIsland then
            TeleportToIsland()
        end
    end
end)

-- // AUTO STATS SYSTEM
local Replicated = game:GetService((string.char(82) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(112) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(101)))
local CommF = Replicated:WaitForChild((string.char(82) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(115))):WaitForChild((string.char(67) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(70) .. string.char(95)))
      _0x7e5b42 = 179
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 179 then
      
local AutoStats = false
local PointsPerTick = 1

local StatsSelect = {
    Melee = false,
    Defense = false,
    Sword = false,
    Gun = false,
    BloxFruit = false,
}

local function AddPoint(Stat, Amount)
    pcall(function()
        CommF:InvokeServer((string.char(65) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116)), Stat, Amount, false)
    end)
end

local function DistributePoints()
    while AutoStats do
        task.wait(0.4)

        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local statsFolder = player:FindFirstChild((string.char(68) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(97)))
        if not statsFolder then continue end
        
        local points = statsFolder:FindFirstChild((string.char(80) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(115)))
        if not points or points.Value <= 0 then continue end
        
        -- Ver quantos Stats estÃ£o ativos
        local EnabledStats = {}
        for stat, enabled in pairs(StatsSelect) do
            if enabled then
                table.insert(EnabledStats, stat)
            end
        end
        
        if #EnabledStats > 0 then
            local amountEach = math.floor(PointsPerTick / #EnabledStats)
            if amountEach < 1 then amountEach = 1 end
            
            for _, stat in ipairs(EnabledStats) do
                AddPoint(stat, amountEach)
            end
        end
    end
end

-- UI
v497:AddSlider({
      _0x7e5b42 = 180
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 180 then
          Name = (string.char(80) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(65) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116)),
    Min = 1,
    Max = 500,
    Increase = 1,
    Default = 1,
    Callback = function(v)
        PointsPerTick = v
    end
})

v497:AddToggle({
    Name = (string.char(65) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(115)),
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(v)
        AutoStats = v
        if v then
            task.spawn(DistributePoints)
        end
    end
})

local AimbotEnabled = false
local AimPlayers = false
local AimMobs = false
local IgnoreMobs = true

-- ===============================
-- FUNÇÃO DE ATUALIZAÇÃO (COMPATÍVEL COM SUA LÓGICA)
-- ===============================
local function UpdateAimbot()
    if not AimbotEnabled then
        v1:SetPlayerSilentAim(false)
        v1:SetNPCSilentAim(false)
        return
    end

    -- Se estiver mirando players
    if AimPlayers then
        v1:SetPlayerSilentAim(true)
        v1:SetNPCSilentAim(false)
        return
    end

    -- Se estiver mirando mobs
    if AimMobs then
        if IgnoreMobs then
            v1:SetNPCSilentAim(false)
        else
            v1:SetNPCSilentAim(true)
        end
        v1:SetPlayerSilentAim(false)
        return
    end

      _0x7e5b42 = 182
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 182 then
          -- fallback de segurança
    v1:SetPlayerSilentAim(false)
    v1:SetNPCSilentAim(false)
end

-- ===============================
-- TOGGLE PRINCIPAL
-- ===============================
v494:AddToggle({
    Name = (string.char(65) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(71) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(110)),
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(v)
        AimbotEnabled = v

        if not v then
            v1:Pause()
        else
            v1:Restore()
        end

        UpdateAimbot()
    end
})

    Default = false,
    Callback = function(v)
        AimPlayers = v

        if v then
            AimMobs = false
        end

        UpdateAimbot()
    end
})

    Name = (string.char(73) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(77) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(115)),

							obj.TextSize = Value

		end
	end
})

local _0x9745b3 = game:GetService((string.char(80) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(115)))
local RunService = game:GetService((string.char(82) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(118) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(101)))

local LocalPlayer = _0x9745b3.LocalPlayer
local ESP_SAVE_FILE = (string.char(101) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(112) .. string.char(95) .. string.char(112) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(95) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(118) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(46) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(120) .. string.char(116))

-- Estado salvo
local ESPPlayer = false

	ESPPlayer = readfile(ESP_SAVE_FILE) == (string.char(116) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(101))

      _0x7e5b42 = 186
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 186 then

local Connections = {}

-- Remove ESP
local function RemoveESP(player)
	if player.Character then
		local hrp = player.Character:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116)))
		if hrp then
			local esp = hrp:FindFirstChild((string.char(80) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(69) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(80)))
			if esp then
				esp:Destroy()
			end
		end
	end

	if Connections[player] then
		Connections[player]:Disconnect()
		Connections[player] = nil
	end
end

-- Criar ESP
local function CreateESP(player)
	if player == LocalPlayer then return end
	if not ESPPlayer then return end
	if not player.Character then return end

	local char = player.Character
	local hrp = char:WaitForChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116)), 3)
	local hum = char:WaitForChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100)), 3)

	if not hrp or not hum then return end

	RemoveESP(player)

	local gui = Instance.new((string.char(66) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(71) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(105)))
	gui.Name = (string.char(80) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(69) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(80))
	gui.Adornee = hrp
	gui.Size = UDim2.new(0, 220, 0, 40)
	gui.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
	gui.AlwaysOnTop = true
	gui.MaxDistance = 999999
	gui.LightInfluence = 0
	gui.Parent = hrp

	local nameLabel = Instance.new((string.char(84) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(120) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(76) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(108)))
	nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
      _0x7e5b42 = 187
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 187 then
      	nameLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
	nameLabel.RichText = true
    nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(210,210,210) 
	nameLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	nameLabel.TextSize = 24
	nameLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
	nameLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	nameLabel.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	nameLabel.Parent = gui

	local hpLabel = Instance.new((string.char(84) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(120) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(76) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(108)))
	hpLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	hpLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
	hpLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, 0)
	hpLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0,255,0)
	hpLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	hpLabel.TextSize = 24
	hpLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
	hpLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	hpLabel.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	hpLabel.Parent = gui

	Connections[player] = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()

		if not ESPPlayer then
			RemoveESP(player)
			return
		end

		if not player.Character or hum.Health <= 0 then
			RemoveESP(player)
			return
		end

		local myChar = LocalPlayer.Character
		if not myChar then return end

		local myHRP = myChar:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116)))
		if not myHRP then return end

		local distance = math.floor(
			(myHRP.Position - hrp.Position).Magnitude
		)

    	nameLabel.Text = (string.char(60) .. string.char(102) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(61) .. string.char(39) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(40) .. string.char(50) .. string.char(51) .. string.char(53) .. string.char(44) .. string.char(50) .. string.char(51) .. string.char(53) .. string.char(44) .. string.char(50) .. string.char(51) .. string.char(53) .. string.char(41) .. string.char(39) .. string.char(62)) .. player.Name .. (string.char(60) .. string.char(47) .. string.char(102) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(62) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(91) .. string.char(32))  ..  distance .. (string.char(109) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(93))
		hpLabel.Text = "[" .. math.floor(hum.Health) .. "/" .. math.floor(hum.MaxHealth) .. "]"
	end)
end

-- Setup jogador (resolve spawn + respawn)
      _0x7e5b42 = 188
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 188 then
      local function SetupPlayer(player)
	if player == LocalPlayer then return end

	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
		if ESPPlayer then
			task.wait(0.2)
			CreateESP(player)
		end
	end)

	if player.Character then
		task.wait(0.2)
		CreateESP(player)
	end
end

-- Aplicar para jogadores já no servidor
for _,player in ipairs(_0x9745b3:GetPlayers()) do
	SetupPlayer(player)
end

-- Jogadores novos
_0x9745b3.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
	SetupPlayer(player)
end)

_0x9745b3.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
	RemoveESP(player)
end)

	Default = ESPPlayer,
	Callback = function(v)
		ESPPlayer = v
		writefile(ESP_SAVE_FILE, tostring(v))

		for _,player in ipairs(_0x9745b3:GetPlayers()) do
			if player ~= LocalPlayer then
				if v then
					CreateESP(player)
				else
					RemoveESP(player)
				end
			end
		end
	end
})

v494:AddToggle({
    Title = (string.char(69) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(70) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(115)),
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        DevilFruitESP = state

        if DevilFruitESP then

local _ = v495:AddSection({(string.char(70) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(104) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(83) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(101))})

local function HRP()
	return LP.Character and LP.Character:FindFirstChild((string.char(72) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(82) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116)))
end

local LV, AO
local TargetPos

local function EnsureFly()
	local hrp = HRP()
	if not hrp then return end

	if not LV or LV.Parent ~= hrp then
		if LV then LV:Destroy() end
		LV = Instance.new((string.char(76) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(86) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(121)))
		LV.Attachment0 = hrp:FindFirstChildOfClass((string.char(65) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(104) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116))) or Instance.new((string.char(65) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(104) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116)), hrp)
		LV.MaxForce = math.huge
		LV.VectorVelocity = Vector3.zero
		LV.Parent = hrp
	end

	if not AO or AO.Parent ~= hrp then
		if AO then AO:Destroy() end
		AO = Instance.new((string.char(65) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(79) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110)))
		AO.Attachment0 = hrp:FindFirstChildOfClass((string.char(65) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(104) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(116)))
		AO.MaxTorque = math.huge
		AO.Responsiveness = 200
		AO.Parent = hrp
	end
end

local function StopFly()
      _0x7e5b42 = 193
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 193 then
      	RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep((string.char(66) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(70) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(121)))
	if LV then LV:Destroy() LV=nil end
	if AO then AO:Destroy() AO=nil end
	TargetPos = nil
end

local function FlyTo(pos)
	TargetPos = pos

	RunService:BindToRenderStep((string.char(66) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(121) .. string.char(70) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(121)), Enum.RenderPriority.Character.Value + 1, function()
		if not _G.BuyFly then StopFly() return end

		local hrp = HRP()
		if not hrp then return end

		EnsureFly()

		for _,v in ipairs(LP.Character:GetDescendants()) do
			if v:IsA((string.char(66) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116))) then v.CanCollide = false end
		end

		local delta = TargetPos - hrp.Position
		local dist = delta.Magnitude

		if dist <= 3 then
			LV.VectorVelocity = Vector3.zero
			hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
			hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(TargetPos)
			return
		end

		local dir = delta.Unit
		LV.VectorVelocity = dir * math.clamp(dist * 6, 120, 330)
		AO.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(hrp.Position, hrp.Position + dir)
	end)
end

local function Buy(style, remote)
	task.spawn(function()
		local pos = NPCS[style] and NPCS[style][SEA]
		if not pos then return end

		FlyTo(pos[1])

		repeat task.wait()
		until (HRP() and (HRP().Position - pos[1]).Magnitude <= 4) or not _G.BuyFly

		if _G.BuyFly then
			_0x1e8466.Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer(remote)
		end
      _0x7e5b42 = 194
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 194 then
      	end)
end

LP.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
	task.wait(0.4)
	if _G.BuyFly and TargetPos then
		FlyTo(TargetPos)
	end
end)
local function StopAllBuy()
	_G.BuyFly = false
	StopFly()
end

function InMyNetWork(v1168)
    if not isnetworkowner then
        if (v1168.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude > 320 then
            return false
        else
            return true
        end
    else
        return isnetworkowner(v1168)
    end
end

    for _, v1180 in next, getgc() do
        if typeof(v1180) == (string.char(102) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(110) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(110)) and getfenv(v1180).script == game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild((string.char(68) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(101))) then
            for v1181, v1182 in next, getupvalues(v1180) do
      _0x7e5b42 = 209
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 209 then
                      if tostring(v1182) == (string.char(48) .. string.char(46) .. string.char(52)) then
                    setupvalue(v1180, v1181, 0)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

local FULLBRIGHT_SAVE_FILE = (string.char(102) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(104) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(95) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(118) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(46) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(120) .. string.char(116))

-- Salvar valores originais
local OriginalLighting = {
	Ambient = Lighting.Ambient,
	ColorShift_Bottom = Lighting.ColorShift_Bottom,
	ColorShift_Top = Lighting.ColorShift_Top,
	Brightness = Lighting.Brightness,
	GlobalShadows = Lighting.GlobalShadows
}

local function ApplyFullBright(state)
	if state then
		Lighting.Ambient = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
		Lighting.ColorShift_Bottom = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
		Lighting.ColorShift_Top = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
		Lighting.Brightness = 3
		Lighting.GlobalShadows = false
	else
		-- Restaurar original
		Lighting.Ambient = OriginalLighting.Ambient
		Lighting.ColorShift_Bottom = OriginalLighting.ColorShift_Bottom
		Lighting.ColorShift_Top = OriginalLighting.ColorShift_Top
		Lighting.Brightness = OriginalLighting.Brightness
		Lighting.GlobalShadows = OriginalLighting.GlobalShadows
	end
end

local FullBrightEnabled = false

if isfile(FULLBRIGHT_SAVE_FILE) then
	FullBrightEnabled = readfile(FULLBRIGHT_SAVE_FILE) == (string.char(116) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(101))
else
	writefile(FULLBRIGHT_SAVE_FILE, (string.char(102) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(101)))
end

ApplyFullBright(FullBrightEnabled)

      _0x7e5b42 = 211
    end
    if _0x7e5b42 == 211 then
      v496:AddToggle({
	Title = (string.char(70) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(32) .. string.char(66) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(104) .. string.char(116)),
	Value = FullBrightEnabled,
	Callback = function(Value)
		FullBrightEnabled = Value
		writefile(FULLBRIGHT_SAVE_FILE, tostring(Value))
		ApplyFullBright(Value)
	end
})

-- ===== PEGAR SERVIDOR DIFERENTE =====
function GetNewServer()
    local Servers = {}
    
    local req = game:HttpGet(
        (string.char(104) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(112) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(58) .. string.char(47) .. string.char(47) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(46) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(120) .. string.char(46) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(47) .. string.char(118) .. string.char(49) .. string.char(47) .. string.char(103) .. string.char(97) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(47))..PlaceId..(string.char(47) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(118) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(47) .. string.char(80) .. string.char(117) .. string.char(98) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(63) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(111) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(79) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(100) .. string.char(101) .. string.char(114) .. string.char(61) .. string.char(65) .. string.char(115) .. string.char(99) .. string.char(38) .. string.char(108) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(109) .. string.char(105) .. string.char(116) .. string.char(61) .. string.char(49) .. string.char(48) .. string.char(48))
    )
    
    local data = _0x27cfcd:JSONDecode(req)

    for _, server in pairs(data.data) do
        if server.playing < server.maxPlayers and server.id ~= JobId then
            table.insert(Servers, server.id)
        end
    end

    if #Servers > 0 then
        return Servers[math.random(1, #Servers)]
    end
end

connection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	local elapsed = tick() - startTime
	local remaining = math.clamp(duration - elapsed, 0, duration)
	timerLabel.Text = string.format((string.char(37) .. string.char(46) .. string.char(49) .. string.char(102)), remaining)

	if remaining <= 0 then
		connection:Disconnect()
	end
end)
